pages.name: Home
pages.description: Main landing page introducing the artist and linking to key sections: music, tour, store, videos, playlists, itinerary, and newsletter.
primary_functions: Highlight latest releases, featured videos, and upcoming shows with quick links to detailed sections
Provide direct navigation to Music, Tour, Store, Videos, Newsletter, and Itinerary
Surface a few upcoming tour dates with links to the full tour listing and specific event pages
Promote merch highlights with links into the store and product detail pages
Offer a prominent entry point to newsletter signup

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a latest release album card or 'Explore Music' CTA
Click on an upcoming show teaser or 'View All Tour Dates' CTA
Click on a specific upcoming event card
Click on featured merch block or 'Shop All Merch' CTA
Click on a specific featured product
Click on a featured video thumbnail or 'Watch More Videos' CTA
Click on homepage newsletter promo
Click on 'View My Itinerary' in an upcoming shows widget

access_methods.description: Header link 'Home' points to index.html
Root URL of the site

pages.name: Tour & Live Shows
pages.description: Browse and filter all upcoming tour dates and live shows, with tools for location and date-based discovery.
primary_functions: List upcoming shows with key info (date, city, country, venue)
Filter shows by location (city, country) and by month/year (e.g., September 2025, October 2025)
Sort visible shows by date (earliest to latest) to support chronological planning
Open detailed event pages for specific shows
Optionally add shows directly to the itinerary or saved tickets from the list view

incoming_params.description: Optional city filter to pre-limit results, e.g., 'Berlin'
Optional country filter, e.g., 'Germany'
Numeric month (1–12) used together with 'year' to filter by month/year, e.g., 9 for September 2025
Four-digit year used with 'month' (e.g., 2025)
Optional event status filter if pre-applied, e.g., 'scheduled'
Sort order for events, typically 'date_asc' or 'date_desc'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a tour date row or 'Details' button for a specific show
Click 'View My Itinerary' from a mini-itinerary summary on this page
Click on a newsletter promo related to tour announcements

access_methods.description: Header link 'Tour' points to tour.html
Links from Home and About pages to browse tour dates
Accessed with city/month/year filters via query string

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detailed information for a specific concert or live event, including ticket options and itinerary actions.
primary_functions: Display full event details (date, time, city, country, venue, support acts, basic map info)
List available ticket options with labels such as 'Seated' and 'General Admission'
Sort ticket options by criteria including 'Price: Low to High' to find cheap tickets quickly
Allow selection of ticket type and quantity (e.g., 1 Seated ticket in Berlin, Sept 2025)
Save a specific ticket choice to a personal list (e.g., 'Save Ticket' / 'Add to Itinerary' / 'Add to Favorites') for later reference
Add the event (with chosen ticket type) to the user's mini-tour itinerary

incoming_params.description: Event ID used to load full event details and ticket options

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View Itinerary' after saving a ticket or adding the event to a mini-tour
Click 'Back to All Dates' from event detail

access_methods.description: Accessed via event.html?id={eventId} from tour listings or home
Linked from upcoming events modules across the site

pages.name: Itinerary
pages.description: Overview and management of the user's planned shows and saved ticket selections, including mini-tour planning.
primary_functions: Display a list of saved events and planned shows with dates, cities, countries, and chosen ticket types
Show at-a-glance itinerary details, including how many shows and in which countries
Allow editing or removing events from the itinerary (e.g., change ticket type or delete an entry)
Support reviewing mini-tours such as a two-country October 2025 plan

incoming_params.description: Optional event ID to scroll to or highlight a recently added itinerary item

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an itinerary event name to review details or update ticket selection
Click 'Plan More October 2025 Shows' when reviewing an October mini-tour

access_methods.description: Header link 'Itinerary' points to itinerary.html
Links from Event Detail after saving tickets
Optional focusEventId param used when coming from a specific event

pages.name: Music / Discography
pages.description: Central hub to browse the artist’s albums and individual songs/tracks, with filtering and playlist-creation tools.
primary_functions: Switch between viewing 'Albums' and 'Songs/Tracks' using a content-type toggle
Filter albums by type (e.g., 'Studio Albums') and release year range (e.g., 2015–2023, 2020 only)
Filter tracks by release year range (e.g., 2018–2022) and genre/style (e.g., 'Acoustic')
Sort albums or tracks by criteria such as release date (newest to oldest)
Open album detail pages from album entries
Select one or more tracks and add them to a playlist, including creating a new playlist (e.g., 'Acoustic 2018-22') via an inline dialog

incoming_params.description: Controls initial view mode: 'albums' or 'tracks'; maps to DiscographyViewState.view_mode
Optional lower bound for release year filters (e.g., 2018)
Optional upper bound for release year filters (e.g., 2022 or 2023)
Sort order for albums or tracks, e.g., 'release_date_desc'
Initial track genre/style filter, e.g., 'acoustic'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an album cover or title in Albums view
Click on a track title in Tracks view or an album’s tracklist slice
After creating a new playlist via 'Add to playlist' dialog, optionally open that playlist

access_methods.description: Header link 'Music' points to discography.html?view=albums
Links from Home, About, and Playlists pages
View mode and filter parameters supplied via query string

pages.name: Album Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific album, including tracklist, durations, and the ability to favorite albums for comparison.
primary_functions: Show album information (title, artwork, release year, type, description)
Display full tracklist with track order, titles, and durations
Show overall album stats such as total track count and total running time to compare albums under 60 minutes
Allow opening individual track detail/lyrics pages from the tracklist
Enable marking the album as a favorite (e.g., for choosing the better 2015–2023 album)

incoming_params.description: Album ID whose details and tracklist should be shown

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a track title in the album tracklist
Click 'Back to Albums' from the album detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed via album.html?id={albumId} from discography or homepage
Linked from latest releases and other promotional blocks

pages.name: Track Detail & Lyrics
pages.description: Song-focused page with metadata, playback, multilingual lyrics, and playlist/favorite actions.
primary_functions: Display track details such as title, album, release year, duration, and artwork
Provide lyrics with a language selector or translation dropdown (including Spanish)
Allow switching lyrics language and viewing the selected language version in full
Enable marking the track as a favorite (e.g., for a 2020 song with 'midnight' in the title)
Offer controls to add the track to existing playlists or create a new playlist from this page

incoming_params.description: Track ID whose metadata and lyrics should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the album name or artwork in the track header
Click 'Back to All Tracks' from the track page
After adding the track to a specific playlist, optionally open that playlist

access_methods.description: Accessed via track.html?id={trackId} from album, discography, playlists, or home

pages.name: Playlists
pages.description: Manage playlists created from the artist’s tracks, including viewing, editing, and reordering.
primary_functions: Display a list of all user-created playlists (e.g., 'Acoustic 2018-22')
Allow creating new playlists, renaming, or deleting existing playlists
Show the tracks within a selected playlist and allow removing or reordering tracks
Provide playback controls for entire playlists (conceptual) and links to track detail pages

incoming_params.description: Optional playlist ID to focus or expand when the page loads (e.g., newly created 'Acoustic 2018-22')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a track title inside a playlist
Click 'Add More Songs' from a playlist to browse tracks

access_methods.description: Header link 'Playlists' points to playlists.html
Links from music-related CTAs (e.g., after playlist creation)
playlistId param used to open a specific playlist on load

pages.name: Store / Merch
pages.description: Online merchandise catalog including clothing, music, and other items, with robust filtering for ratings and pricing.
primary_functions: Display main merch categories (e.g., Clothing, Music, Accessories) and subcategories
Within Clothing, allow selecting subcategories like 'T-Shirts' and 'Hoodies & Sweatshirts'
Filter merchandise by rating (e.g., '4 stars & up'), price range, and other attributes
Sort results by options including 'Price: Low to High' to find budget-friendly items
Open individual product detail pages for more information and purchase options

incoming_params.description: Category filter code mapping to ProductCategory.code, e.g., 'all', 'clothing', 't_shirts', 'hoodies_sweatshirts'
Initial rating filter code, e.g., 'four_stars_up'
Initial sort order, e.g., 'price_low_to_high'
Optional minimum price filter
Optional maximum price filter
Optional product_type to prefilter within a category, e.g., 't_shirt' or 'hoodie'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card/image/name in any category or clothing subcategory
Click 'View Cart' from the store header/cart icon within the store section

access_methods.description: Header link 'Store' points to store.html?categoryId=all
Links from Home and footer to specific categories like clothing
Category and filter state passed via query string

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific merchandise item such as a T-shirt or hoodie, with configuration and add-to-cart actions.
primary_functions: Show product images, description, available sizes/colors, price, and customer rating
Allow selection of size (e.g., M) and quantity before purchase
Add the configured product (e.g., T-shirt or hoodie) to the cart
Display related or recommended products with links back to the store listings

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose details should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after successfully adding the item
Click on a related products category link, e.g., 'Back to T-Shirts'

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id={productId} from store listings or featured merch

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart summary for merchandise orders, showing items, sizes, quantities, and totals.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the cart with size, quantity, price, and rating snapshots
Allow adjusting quantities or removing items from the cart
Show item subtotals and overall order total to confirm combined price constraints (e.g., T-shirt + hoodie ≤ $80)
Provide a path toward checkout (if implemented) or saving the cart for later

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue Shopping' to return to clothing items
Click on a cart item name to view its product details

access_methods.description: Header link 'Cart' points to cart.html
Links from product and store pages after adding items

pages.name: Newsletter Signup
pages.description: Dedicated form for subscribing to the artist’s email newsletter, managing preferences and frequency.
primary_functions: Collect subscriber information including email, first name, last name, country, and city
Allow choosing content interests (e.g., New Releases, Tour Announcements, Behind-the-Scenes)
Allow selecting preferred email frequency (e.g., Weekly)
Require acceptance of privacy/terms via a checkbox if applicable
Submit the completed subscription form and show confirmation

incoming_params.description: Optional code describing where the signup was initiated, e.g., 'home_banner', 'footer', 'tour_page'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the privacy policy/terms link near the consent checkbox
Click 'Back to Home' after successful subscription confirmation

access_methods.description: Header link 'Newsletter' points to newsletter.html
Footer link 'Newsletter Signup' points to newsletter.html
Promotional banners and modals across the site
Form submits to submitNewsletterSubscription and remains on the same page

pages.name: Videos
pages.description: Catalog of the artist’s videos including live performances and official clips, with filtering by type, date, duration, and popularity.
primary_functions: Filter videos by content type (e.g., 'Live Performances')
Sort or filter videos by upload/recorded date (e.g., post-2023, newest to oldest)
Filter or identify videos by duration (e.g., 5 minutes or longer) and view count thresholds
Open individual video detail pages to watch and save videos

incoming_params.description: Initial content type filter, e.g., 'live_performance'
ISO date string for earliest recorded/uploaded date filter, e.g., '2023-01-01'
ISO date string for latest date filter if pre-applied
Minimum duration in seconds, e.g., 300 for 5 minutes
Minimum view count threshold, e.g., 10000
Sort order for videos, e.g., 'date_desc' or 'views_desc'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a video thumbnail or title in the listing

access_methods.description: Header link 'Videos' points to videos.html
Footer link 'Videos' points to videos.html
Links from Home and other media promos
Filters set via query string to pre-configure listings

pages.name: Video Detail
pages.description: Player page for a single video with metadata and ability to add it to a Watch Later list.
primary_functions: Play the selected video and display metadata (title, date, duration, views)
Allow adding the video to 'Watch Later' or another saved list
If multiple lists are supported, let the user choose or create a list (e.g., default 'watch_later')
Provide navigation back to the main videos catalog or to related videos

incoming_params.description: Video ID to play and show details for

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Videos' from the video detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed via video.html?id={videoId} from video listings or homepage

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the artist and the project, with links into core sections.
primary_functions: Present an artist biography, influences, and career highlights
Show press quotes, achievements, and notable collaborations
Link to key sections such as Music, Tour, and Contact for deeper engagement

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Explore the Music' in the About page content
Click 'See Tour Dates' from the bio or highlights section
Click 'Contact / Press' link in About

access_methods.description: Footer link 'About' points to about.html
Links from press kits or external sites

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and inquiry form for fans, press, and promoters.
primary_functions: Provide contact details for management, booking, and press (if applicable)
Offer a simple contact form for general inquiries or feedback
Link to social channels or other communication platforms

incoming_params.description: Optional topic to preselect in the contact form, e.g., 'press', 'booking', or 'general'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' after submitting a message or from page header

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Contact' points to contact.html
Contact form submits via submitContactForm and remains on the same page with a confirmation message

pages.name: Privacy & Terms
pages.description: Legal and policy information for the website, including privacy policy and terms of use.
primary_functions: Display the website’s privacy policy and data usage explanations
Display terms of use and any relevant disclaimers
Offer links or references from the newsletter form and other areas that require policy acknowledgment

incoming_params.description: Optional anchor to scroll to 'privacy' or 'terms' section on load

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Newsletter Signup' from within policy text when arriving from a signup context

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Privacy & Terms' points to policies.html
Links from consent checkboxes and other legal references

header_links.description: Homepage with featured music, shows, merch, and updates
Browse albums and songs in the discography
View and filter upcoming tour dates and live shows
Shop official merchandise across all categories
Watch official videos and live performances
Subscribe to the artist newsletter with preferences
View and manage your planned shows and saved tickets
Manage your created playlists from the artist’s songs
View and edit items added to your merchandise cart

footer_links.description: Get in touch with management or send a message
Read the privacy policy and terms of use
